user_invitations_first_access_user_pendi.name: user_invitations_first_access_user_pending_unique
user_invitations_first_access_user_pendi.where: "user_invitations"."purpose" = 'FIRST_ACCESS'::invite_purpose and "user_invitations"."consumed_at" is null and "user_invitations"."deleted_at" is null

user_invitations_membership_member_pendi.name: user_invitations_membership_member_pending_unique
user_invitations_membership_member_pendi.where: "user_invitations"."purpose" = 'MEMBERSHIP_ACCEPT'::invite_purpose and "user_invitations"."member_id" is not null and "user_invitations"."consumed_at" is null and "user_invitations"."deleted_at" is null

users_email_active_unique.name: users_email_active_unique
users_email_active_unique.where: "users"."user_email" is not null and "users"."deleted_at" is null

users_phone_active_unique.name: users_phone_active_unique
users_phone_active_unique.where: "users"."user_phone" is not null and "users"."deleted_at" is null

stock_movements_transfer_requires_sector.name: stock_movements_transfer_requires_sectors
stock_movements_transfer_requires_sector.value: "stock_movements"."type" <> 'TRANSFERENCIA' OR ("stock_movements"."from_stock_sector_id" IS NOT NULL AND "stock_movements"."to_stock_sector_id" IS NOT NULL)

stock_movements_transfer_requires_locati.name: stock_movements_transfer_requires_locations
stock_movements_transfer_requires_locati.value: "stock_movements"."type" <> 'TRANSFERENCIA' OR ("stock_movements"."from_stock_location_id" IS NOT NULL AND "stock_movements"."to_stock_location_id" IS NOT NULL AND "stock_movements"."from_stock_location_id" <> "stock_movements"."to_stock_location_id")

stock_movements_transfer_batches_consist.name: stock_movements_transfer_batches_consistent
stock_movements_transfer_batches_consist.value: "stock_movements"."type" <> 'TRANSFERENCIA' OR (("stock_movements"."from_stock_batch_id" IS NULL AND "stock_movements"."to_stock_batch_id" IS NULL) OR ("stock_movements"."from_stock_batch_id" IS NOT NULL AND "stock_movements"."to_stock_batch_id" IS NOT NULL))
